markdownRemark.excerpt: As-salāmu ʿaláikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, This is to inform the registered students of Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s Book of Purification class (held at…
markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿaláikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

  1. This is to inform the registered students of Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s Book of Purification class (held at Carleton University), that classes will be postponed until after the month of Ramaḍān.
  2. As for the Ramaḍān fiqh class (held at Muṣallá As-Ṣaḥāba), these classes will continue on Sundays at 7:00pm, unless otherwise specified. Please check you email for any updates and please pass on this message.

BarākAllāhu fīkum.
